doc_title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition Status

key_facts.reason_jp: 信託型株式報酬制度に基づいた普通株式の取得のため、自己株式取得を一時停止中

summary_en: Suruga Bank reports zero share purchases in the May 15–18, 2026 tranche; buyback program authorized for up to 5M shares (¥12B) through December 31, 2026, but suspended during June 19, 2026 for trust-based equity compensation.
summary_jp: スルガ銀行が2026年5月15日～18日の期間で0株購入と報告。信託型株式報酬制度のため6月19日まで取得を実施しない予定。授権上限は500万株（¥120億）。
tag_en: Buyback · 0 shares (0% S/O) · ¥0M · May 15–18, 2026 (no purchases) · TSE market · Authorized: 5M shares (2.92% S/O) · ¥12,000M through Dec 31, 2026

summary_en: スルガ銀 cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: スルガ銀が自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。
tag_jp: 自己株式消却・詳細確認中

summary_en: スルガ銀 authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: スルガ銀が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: スルガ銀 announced a material dividend change (dividend hike). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: スルガ銀が配当方針変更を開示（増配）。資本還元基準が刷新。
tag_jp: 配当方針・詳細確認中
